title: Incident recovery: cron loop + rate limit outage
description: Full incident recovery: deleted 6 stale deleteAfterRun cron jobs, re-enabled all 11 recurring jobs with optimized schedule (heartbeat 8x→4x, niche 5x→2x→1x, tasks 30min→2h), rewrote restart-gateway.sh to remove auto-injected one-shot jobs, updated AGENTS.md with incident rules, updated TOOLS.md with cooldown/Telegram workarounds, recreated Mission Control LaunchAgents, ran full self-audit

title: AGENTS.md rules audit + additions
description: Added 6 missing rules: clarify-before-executing, instruction specificity, automatic skill detection, cross-file consistency (standalone), context management (100K token + runaway loop), prompt injection pattern sync. Updated LaunchAgent category rules. Added cron safety rules. Updated Mistakes Log with 2 new incident entries.
